title: dioon edule var. lanuginosum
intro: Dioon edule var. lanuginosum, also known as the woolly Mexican cycad, is a variety of the Dioon edule plant, a type of cycad that belongs to the family Zamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dioon edule var. lanuginosum include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
